accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and accurate CRA context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; CRA and chapter 8 context is accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves the BLM rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule will have no force or effect and that Congress rejects rather than amends underlying statutes.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution contains no material exceptions or carve-outs.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the law was approved December 5, 2025, and relevant dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential operative effect of nullifying the rule.

correct_entities.why: BLM, GAO, and the CRA are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All dates (April 25, 2022; July 24, 2025; July 28, 2025; December 5, 2025) match the bill.
